# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

repositories:
  s3_repository:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: my-s3-bucket
      region: us-east-1
      role_arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/elasticsearch-s3-role

  file_repository:
    type: fs
    settings:
      location: /mnt/backups

snapshots:
  daily_snapshot:
    repository: s3_repository
    schedule: "0 0 0 * * ?"
    retain_count: 7

  restore_snapshot:
    repository: file_repository
    snapshot: "snapshot_name"
